title: CommitResult
description: Output of bin/try-commit.sh — the staged-diff commit attempt + hook outcome. Consumed by skills/commit/SKILL.md.

result.description: Outcome bucket. 'committed' = git commit succeeded; 'rejected' = a hook (commit-msg / pre-commit) refused; 'error' = anything else.

sha.description: Resolved commit SHA when result=='committed', null otherwise.

subject.description: First line of the commit message that was attempted (always present so the skill can re-prompt with context).

stage.description: Which hook stage rejected the commit (only meaningful when result=='rejected'). null for committed/error.

reason.description: Stderr captured from the failing git/hook process. Truncated by try-commit if huge.

exit_code.description: Raw exit code from `git commit` (0 on success).
